title: majorana orega
intro: Majorana orega, also known as sweet marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of antioxidants and essential oils. The health benefits of majorana orega include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and stress, as well as its ability to promote better sleep and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of majorana orega include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe sore muscles and calm the mind.
